narrative:
Pedri is a central midfielder representing Spain at this tournament. His overall rating stands at 7.17/10, placing him in the top 5% of central midfields at this World Cup. This rating range of 6.82–7.52 reflects his consistent performance, with 34% derived from this World Cup and 66% from club form.

Pedri demonstrates significant creative and defensive prowess, evidenced by his 0.366 expected assists per 90 minutes and 1.827 key passes per 90 minutes in this tournament. He also contributes robustly defensively, making 2.056 tackles and 1.827 interceptions per 90 minutes. However, his 0.056 expected goals per 90 minutes and 0.457 shots per 90 minutes indicate he is not a primary goal-scoring threat.

Pedri is clearly a pivotal creative and defensive engine for Spain, orchestrating play from central midfield over 394 minutes played. Scouts should continue to observe his high volume of key passes and expected assists, which are crucial for Spain's attacking build-up. His defensive contributions, particularly his tackles and interceptions, will also be vital in controlling the midfield in upcoming matches.
